info.title: SolutionFilterGenerator
info.description: A dotnet tool for generating solution filter (.slnf) files based on globs

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Solution filter generator
Example of excluding test projects: 'slnf-gen MySolution.sln --exclude **/*Test*' which creates MySolution.slnf

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Optional path of output .slnf file. Defaults to same directory and file name as .sln file but different file extension

arguments.name: path to sln
arguments.description: File path to the solution (.sln) file
